name: cli
description: Author, deploy, and manage ArchAgent configs and conversations from Codex through the ArchAgent CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Authoring, deployment, chat, and config workflows for ArchAgent.
interface.longDescription: Use the public ArchAgent CLI from Codex to author agent configs, manage local config files, build scripts, skills, and workflows, deploy agents, and chat with running agents.
defaultPrompt: Set up local configs for this repo.
